Index.title: Upgrade Your AI's Brain
Index.subtitle: Equip Cursor, Claude Code, Windsurf, GitHub Copilot, and other AI agents with expert-level coding knowledge via a single CLI command.
Index.why_devskill_desc: Everything your AI agent needs to write production-quality code.
Index.how_it_works_desc: Three steps to give your AI agent expert-level coding superpowers.
Index.step1_desc: Execute npx devskill in your project root. The interactive CLI launches instantly.
Index.step2_desc: Select the skill collections that match your tech stack from the visual menu.
Index.step3_desc: Your AI agent now has deep knowledge of your frameworks and conventions.
Index.collections_desc: Curated skill sets designed for specific tech stacks and projects.
Index.collections_builderx_spa: Vue Options API + Pinia architecture for single page applications.
Index.collections_builderx_api: Phoenix Elixir backend — schemas, controllers, Kafka, Redis, RabbitMQ.
Index.collections_landing_page: Phoenix + Vue 2 landing page builder — Ecto, Oban, Plugs, Channels.
Index.collections_vue3_standard: Modern Vue 3 Composition API with Pinia and best practices.
Index.works_with: Works with your favorite AI tools
Index.footer: © 2026 devskill. Open source, built for developers.
Index.contribute_desc: Join the community. Contribute your own skills or suggest frameworks you'd like to see supported.
Index.architecture_desc: A clearly layered knowledge pipeline — manual, generated, and community-synced skills.
Index.arch_manual_desc: Expert-crafted SKILL.md files with project-specific patterns, conventions, and working code examples.
Index.sources_desc: Clone official documentation as git submodules. AI reads and extracts structured skills automatically.
Index.vendor_desc: Auto-sync high-quality skills from community repositories. Keep them fresh with a single sync command.

Hero.description: Skip the tedious setup. Pick your favorite tech stacks from our interactive CLI, and let devskill inject specialized project guidelines (SKILL.md) directly into your AI.

onboarding.title: Instant Integration
onboarding.desc: Run one command, pick your frameworks, and skills stream directly into your project's .agents/skills folder.

accuracy.title: Zero-Hallucination Context
accuracy.desc: From Vue patterns to Phoenix Ecto rules — your AI gets battle-tested knowledge to write code the right way.

frictionless.title: Always Up to Date
frictionless.desc: Sync community skills and regenerate from latest docs with a single command. Your AI never falls behind.
